row2_auxiliary_summary.ego_motion_trend: Forward motion along a straight urban road with slight lane adjustments.
row2_auxiliary_summary.main_object_trajectory_trend: Vehicles on the left and right appear to be moving parallel or stationary; red boxes indicate detected vehicle bounding boxes tracking forward.

semantic.scene_summary: Urban street scene during rainy weather. Wet asphalt reflects surroundings. Multi-lane road with traffic lights, parked cars, and buildings lining both sides.
semantic.visibility_notes: Rain reduces visibility slightly; reflections on wet road obscure some details but key elements remain interpretable.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Smooth forward progression of ego vehicle; other vehicles move consistently with expected traffic flow. No abrupt jumps or disappearances.
logical.object_continuity: Vehicles maintain presence across frames; no sudden appearance/disappearance except due to occlusion or exit from frame.
logical.structure_continuity: Road structure, curbs, and building facades remain stable and continuous over time.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle continues forward steadily at moderate speed, maintaining lane position.
decision.risk_context: Wet road conditions may increase stopping distance; no immediate hazard or emergency maneuver required based on visible context.

semantic.scene_summary: Similar urban rainy street scene with comparable layout: multi-lane road, vehicles, buildings, trees, and traffic infrastructure.
semantic.visibility_notes: Some objects show reduced clarity or slight morphing; rain effects are present but may lack fine detail consistency.

logical.motion_and_temporal_consistency: Overall smooth motion; however, some vehicle shapes exhibit minor warping or flickering between frames. Trajectories generally follow real-world expectations.
logical.object_continuity: Most objects persist across frames; occasional slight shape distortion or edge blurring observed in generated vehicles.
logical.structure_continuity: Road geometry and background structures remain largely consistent; minor artifacts near object edges or distant features.

decision.ego_behavior_description: Ego vehicle moves forward steadily, mirroring reference behavior.
decision.risk_context: No clear risky interaction visible; scene readability is slightly degraded by generation artifacts but sufficient for basic navigation interpretation.

missing_or_weakened_elements: fine texture details on vehicles and road surface
precise definition of lane markings in some frames
artifacts_or_instabilities: minor shape warping in generated vehicles
slight flickering or blurring around object boundaries
reduced contrast in some regions compared to real video
